<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of sebastian/comparator. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\Comparator; abstract class Comparator { private Factory $factory; public function setFactory(Factory $factory): void { $this->factory = $factory; } abstract public function accepts(mixed $expected, mixed $actual): bool; /** * @throws ComparisonFailure */ abstract public function assertEquals(mixed $expected, mixed $actual, float $delta = 0.0, bool $canonicalize = false, bool $ignoreCase = false): void; protected function factory(): Factory { return $this->factory; } }
